description: Claude instance creation API call failures and response handling issues

failureSignatures.errorPattern: res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to create Claude instance' })

rootCauses.detection: Network error on fetch request to /api/claude/instances
Backend service running but processManager.createInstance() throws
Validation errors in request body processing

preventionStrategies.implementation: Validate backend availability before showing create buttons
Add timeout to fetch requests with exponential backoff retry
preventionStrategies.code: const controller = new AbortController(); setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

preventionStrategies.implementation: Parse and display specific error messages from backend
preventionStrategies.code: const errorData = await response.json(); setError(errorData.message || errorData.error);

preventionStrategies.implementation: Track creation attempts and disable buttons when approaching limits
Check system resources before instance creation
preventionStrategies.code: const metrics = await fetch('/api/claude/metrics'); if (metrics.totalInstances >= maxInstances) showResourceWarning();

detectionMechanisms.implementation: Monitor HTTP status codes and response times
Detect when loading state persists beyond expected duration

userExperienceImpact.symptom: Create buttons result in loading state that never resolves
userExperienceImpact.visibility: Loading spinner persists, generic error messages
userExperienceImpact.fallback: Manual page refresh required, no graceful degradation
userExperienceImpact.severity: Prevents primary functionality - cannot create new Claude instances

testingRecommendations.scenario: Frontend attempts instance creation with backend stopped
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Clear error message, retry option, graceful degradation

testingRecommendations.scenario: Exceed creation rate limits (10 per 5 minutes)
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Rate limit error handling, countdown timer, button disable

testingRecommendations.scenario: Slow network conditions causing API timeouts

unitTests: Error state management and UI updates
integrationTests: Backend API integration for instance creation

nldMetadata.calculationMethod: (User Success Rate: 0.25 / Claude Confidence: 0.85) * TDD Factor: 0.70 = 0.22
nldMetadata.tddUsage: Minimal - Basic error handling present but no comprehensive API failure testing
nldMetadata.neuralTrainingStatus: Exported for claude-flow neural pattern training

claude-flowIntegration.exportFormat: API failure patterns for neural training
